nodes.name: Webhook: Receive Funnel Event
nodes.notes: SETUP: Copy this webhook URL and paste into 06-tracking-snippet.js as WEBHOOK_URL. Accepts POST with event data.

nodes.name: Normalize Event Data
nodes.notes: Normalizes camelCase and snake_case field names from the tracking snippet.

nodes.name: Log Event to Google Sheets
nodes.notes: SETUP: Create sheet tab 'Events' with columns: Timestamp, Session_ID, Page_URL, Page_Title, Event_Type, Event_Value, Scroll_Depth, Time_On_Page, Button_ID, Quiz_Step, UTM_Source, UTM_Medium, UTM_Campaign

nodes.name: Schedule: Every Monday 8am
nodes.notes: Fires every Monday at 8am to generate the weekly analytics report.

values.content: You are a funnel analytics expert. Analyze website funnel data and write a clear, jargon-free weekly report for a business owner. Focus on: what's working, what's not, where users drop off, and 3 specific action recommendations. Keep it under 400 words. Use plain English.

parameters.subject: =📊 Weekly Funnel Report — {{ new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-GB', { day: '2-digit', month: 'short', year: 'numeric' }) }}

  • Avg Time on Page: {{ $('Aggregate Weekly Data').first().json.summary.avg_time_on_page_sec }}s

AI Analysis

{{ $json.message.content }}

Sent by Motion Elevation Automation | Reply to unsubscribe

nodes.name: Error Handler
nodes.notes: Catches errors from any node. Connect error outputs here.

motionElevation.description:
SETUP README:

1. WEBHOOK SETUP:
   - Activate this workflow and copy the webhook URL from 'Webhook: Receive Funnel Event' node
   - Paste the URL into 06-tracking-snippet.js as the WEBHOOK_URL constant
   - Add the snippet to your website's <head> or just before </body>

2. GOOGLE SHEETS SETUP:
   - Create a new Google Sheet and note its ID (from the URL)
   - Add a tab named 'Events' with these columns:
     Timestamp | Session_ID | Page_URL | Page_Title | Event_Type | Event_Value | Scroll_Depth | Time_On_Page | Button_ID | Quiz_Step | UTM_Source | UTM_Medium | UTM_Campaign
   - Replace REPLACE_WITH_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID in both Sheets nodes

3. CREDENTIALS:
   - Google Sheets OAuth2: n8n Settings → Credentials → Google Sheets OAuth2 API
   - OpenAI API: n8n Settings → Credentials → OpenAI API
   - SMTP: n8n Settings → Credentials → SMTP

4. EMAIL CONFIG:
   - Replace REPLACE_WITH_SENDER_EMAIL with your sending address
   - Replace REPLACE_WITH_OWNER_EMAIL with where the report should go

5. EVENTS TRACKED BY DEFAULT:
   - page_view: On every page load
   - scroll_depth: At 25%, 50%, 75%, 100%
   - button_click: On any button with data-track attribute
   - quiz_step: On quiz/form step progression
   - time_milestone: At 30s, 60s, 120s on page

COST ESTIMATE: ~$0.002 per weekly report (GPT-4o-mini)
RECOMMENDED PLAN: Send report to REPLACE_WITH_OWNER_EMAIL every Monday at 8am
